ballad-of-the-fjords.passive: When there are at least 3 different Elemental Types in your party, Elemental Mastery will be increased by {{value}}.

blackcliff-pole.passive: After defeating an enemy, ATK is increased by {{value}}% for 30s. This effect has a maximum of 3 stacks, and the duration of each stack is independent of the others.

bloodsoaked-ruins.passive: For 3.5s after using an Elemental Burst, the equipping character's Lunar-Charged DMG dealt to opponents is increased by {{value}}%. Additionally, after triggering a Lunar-Charged reaction, the equipping character will gain Requiem of Ruin: CRIT DMG is increased by {{value}}% for 6s. They will also regain {{value}} Elemental Energy. Elemental Energy can be restored this way once every 14s.

calamity-queller.passive: Gain {{value}}% All Elemental DMG Bonus. Obtain Consummation for 20s after using an Elemental Skill, causing ATK to increase by {{value}}% per second. This ATK increase has a maximum of 6 stacks. When the character equipped with this weapon is not on the field, Consummation's ATK increase is doubled.

crescent-pike.passive: After picking up an Elemental Orb/Particle, Normal and Charged Attacks deal additional DMG equal to {{value}}% of ATK for 5s.

crimson-moons-semblance.passive: Grants a Bond of Life equal to 25% of Max HP when a Charged Attack hits an opponent. This effect can be triggered up to once every 14s. In addition, when the equipping character has a Bond of Life, they gain a {{value}}% DMG Bonus; if the value of the Bond of Life is greater than or equal to 30% of Max HP, then gain an additional {{value}}% DMG Bonus.

deathmatch.passive: If there are at least 2 opponents nearby, ATK is increased by {{value}}% and DEF is increased by {{value}}%. If there are fewer than 2 opponents nearby, ATK is increased by {{value}}%.

dialogues-of-the-desert-sages.passive: When the wielder performs healing, restore {{value}} Energy. This effect can be triggered once every 10s and can occur even when the character is not on the field.

dragons-bane.passive: Increases DMG against opponents affected by Hydro or Pyro by {{value}}%.

dragonspine-spear.passive: Hitting an opponent with Normal and Charged Attacks has a /Hitting an opponent with Normal and Charged Attacks has a /Hitting an opponent with Normal and Charged Attacks has an /Hitting an opponent with Normal and Charged Attacks has a /Hitting an opponent with Normal and Charged Attacks has a {{value}}% chance of forming and dropping an Everfrost Icicle above them, dealing AoE DMG equal to {{value}}% of ATK. Opponents affected by Cryo are instead dealt DMG equal to {{value}}% of ATK. Can only occur once every 10s.

engulfing-lightning.passive: ATK increased by {{value}}% of Energy Recharge over the base 100%. You can gain a maximum bonus of {{value}}% ATK. Gain {{value}}% Energy Recharge for 12s after using an Elemental Burst.

favonius-lance.passive: CRIT Hits have a {{value}}% chance to generate a small amount of Elemental Particles, which will regenerate 6 Energy for the character. Can only occur once every 12s/10.5s/9s/7.5s/6s.

footprint-of-the-rainbow.passive: Using an Elemental Skill increases DEF by {{value}}% for 15s.

fractured-halo.passive: After an Elemental Skill or Elemental Burst is used, ATK is increased by {{value}}% for 20s. If the equipping character creates a Shield while this effect is active, they will gain the Electrifying Edict effect for 20s: All nearby party members deal {{value}}% more Lunar-Charged DMG.

halberd.passive: Normal Attacks deal an additional {{value}}% ATK as DMG. Can only occur once every / ATK as DMG. This effect can only occur once every / ATK as DMG. This effect can only occur once every / ATK as DMG. This effect can only occur once every / ATK as DMG. This effect can only occur once every 10s.

kitain-cross-spear.passive: Increases Elemental Skill DMG by {{value}}%. After Elemental Skill hits an opponent, the character loses 3 Energy but regenerates {{value}} Energy every 2s for the next 6s. This effect can occur once every 10s. Can be triggered even when the character is not on the field.

lithic-spear.passive: For every character in the party who hails from Liyue, the character who equips this weapon gains a {{value}}% ATK increase and a {{value}}% CRIT Rate increase. This effect stacks up to 4 times.

lumidouce-elegy.passive: ATK increased by {{value}}%. After the equipping character triggers Burning on an opponent or deals Dendro DMG to Burning opponents, the DMG dealt is increased by {{value}}%. This effect lasts for 8s, max 2 stacks. When 2 stacks are reached or when the duration is refreshed at 2 stacks, restore {{value}} Energy. Energy can be restored this way once every 12s. The 2 aforementioned effects can be triggered even when the character is off-field.

missive-windspear.passive: Within 10s after an Elemental Reaction is triggered, ATK is increased by {{value}}% and Elemental Mastery is increased by {{value}}.

moonpiercer.passive: After triggering Burning, Quicken, Aggravate, Spread, Bloom, Lunar-Bloom, Hyperbloom, or Burgeon, a Leaf of Revival will be created around the character for a maximum of 10s. When picked up, the Leaf will grant the character {{value}}% ATK for 12s. Only 1 Leaf can be generated this way every 20s. This effect can still be triggered if the character is not on the field.

mountain-bracing-bolt.passive: Decreases Climbing Stamina Consumption by 15% and increases Elemental Skill DMG by {{value}}%. Also, after other nearby party members use Elemental Skills, the equipping character's Elemental Skill DMG will also increase by {{value}}% for 8s.

primordial-jade-winged-spear.passive: On hit, increases ATK by {{value}}% for 6s. Max 7 stacks. This effect can only occur once every 0.3s. While in possession of the maximum possible stacks, DMG dealt is increased by {{value}}%.

prospectors-drill.passive: When the wielder is healed or heals others, they will gain a Unity's Symbol that lasts 30s, up to a maximum of 3 Symbols. When using their Elemental Skill or Burst, all Symbols will be consumed and the Struggle effect will be granted for 10s. For each Symbol consumed, gain {{value}}% ATK and {{value}}% All Elemental DMG Bonus. The Struggle effect can be triggered once every 15s, and Symbols can be gained even when the character is not on the field.

prospectors-shovel.passive: Electro-Charged DMG is increased by {{value}}%, and Lunar-Charged DMG is increased by {{value}}%. Moonsign: Ascendant Gleam: Lunar-Charged DMG is increased by an additional {{value}}%.

prototype-starglitter.passive: After using an Elemental Skill, increases Normal and Charged Attack DMG by {{value}}% for 12s. Max 2 stacks.

rightful-reward.passive: When the wielder is healed, restore {{value}} Energy. This effect can be triggered once every 10s, and can occur even when the character is not on the field.

royal-spear.passive: Upon damaging an opponent, increases CRIT Rate by {{value}}%. Max 5 stacks. A CRIT Hit removes all stacks.

sacrificers-staff.passive: For 6s after an Elemental Skill hits an opponent, ATK is increased by {{value}}% and Energy Recharge is increased by {{value}}%. Max 3 stacks. This effect can be triggered even when the equipping character is off-field.

skyward-spine.passive: Increases CRIT Rate by {{value}}% and increases Normal ATK SPD by 12%. Additionally, Normal and Charged Attacks hits on opponents have a 50% chance to trigger a vacuum blade that deals {{value}}% of ATK as DMG in a small AoE. This effect can occur no more than once every 2s.

staff-of-homa.passive: HP increased by {{value}}%. Additionally, provides an ATK Bonus based on {{value}}% of the wielder's Max HP. When the wielder's HP is less than 50%, this ATK Bonus is increased by an additional {{value}}% of Max HP.

staff-of-the-scarlet-sands.passive: The equipping character gains {{value}}% of their Elemental Mastery as bonus ATK. When an Elemental Skill hits opponents, the Dream of the Scarlet Sands effect will be gained for 10s: The equipping character will gain {{value}}% of their Elemental Mastery as bonus ATK. Max 3 stacks.

symphonist-of-scents.passive: ATK is increased by {{value}}%. When the equipping character is off-field, ATK is increased by an additional {{value}}%. After initiating healing, the equipping character and the character(s) they have healed will obtain the "Sweet Echoes" effect, increasing their ATK by {{value}}% for 3s. This effect can be triggered even if the equipping character is off-field.

tamayuratei-no-ohanashi.passive: Increase ATK by {{value}}% and Movement SPD by 10% for 10s when using an Elemental Skill.

the-catch.passive: Increases Elemental Burst DMG by {{value}}% and Elemental Burst CRIT Rate by {{value}}%.

vortex-vanquisher.passive: Increases Shield Strength by {{value}}%. Scoring hits on opponents increases ATK by {{value}}% for 8s. Max 5 stacks. Can only occur once every 0.3s. While protected by a shield, this ATK increase effect is increased by 100%.

wavebreakers-fin.passive: For every point of the entire party's combined maximum Energy capacity, the Elemental Burst DMG of the character equipping this weapon is increased by {{value}}%. A maximum of {{value}}% increased Elemental Burst DMG can be achieved this way.
